drills.title: Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: He said, "I am tired."
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा, "मैं थका हुआ हूँ।"
sentences.pronunciation: he said "i am tired"

sentences.english: He said that he was tired.
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह थका हुआ था।
sentences.pronunciation: he said that he was tired

sentences.english: She said, "I go to school."
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा, "मैं स्कूल जाती हूँ।"
sentences.pronunciation: she said "i go to school"

drills.title: Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: She said that she went to school.
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह स्कूल जाती थी।
sentences.pronunciation: she said that she went to school

sentences.english: They said, "We are happy."
sentences.hindi: उन्होंने कहा, "हम खुश हैं।"
sentences.pronunciation: they said "we are happy"

sentences.english: They said that they were happy.
sentences.hindi: उन्होंने कहा कि वे खुश थे।
sentences.pronunciation: they said that they were happy

drills.title: Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: He said, "I have eaten food."
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा, "मैंने खाना खा लिया है।"
sentences.pronunciation: he said "i have eaten food"

sentences.english: He said that he had eaten food.
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा कि उसने खाना खा लिया था।
sentences.pronunciation: he said that he had eaten food

sentences.english: He said, "I am doing this."
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा, "मैं यह कर रहा हूँ।"
sentences.pronunciation: he said "i am doing this"

drills.title: Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: He said that he was doing this.
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह यह कर रहा था।
sentences.pronunciation: he said that he was doing this

sentences.english: She said, "I like this."
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा, "मुझे यह पसंद है।"
sentences.pronunciation: she said "i like this"

sentences.english: She said that she liked this.
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा कि उसे यह पसंद था।
sentences.pronunciation: she said that she liked this

drills.title: Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: I said, "I will come."
sentences.hindi: मैंने कहा, "मैं आऊँगा।"
sentences.pronunciation: i said "i will come"

sentences.english: I said that I would come.
sentences.hindi: मैंने कहा कि मैं आऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i said that i would come

sentences.english: He said, "This is true."
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा, "यह सच है।"
sentences.pronunciation: he said "this is true"

drills.title: Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: He said that this was true.
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा कि यह सच था।
sentences.pronunciation: he said that this was true

sentences.english: They said, "We need help."
sentences.hindi: उन्होंने कहा, "हमें मदद चाहिए।"
sentences.pronunciation: they said "we need help"

sentences.english: They said that they needed help.
sentences.hindi: उन्होंने कहा कि उन्हें मदद चाहिए थी।
sentences.pronunciation: they said that they needed help

drills.title: Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: He said, "I understand this."
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा, "मैं यह समझता हूँ।"
sentences.pronunciation: he said "i understand this"

sentences.english: He said that he understood this.
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह यह समझता था।
sentences.pronunciation: he said that he understood this
